full_text: Assad Vala to Shakib, Caught by Charles Amini!! That's a fantastic catch by Amini at long-on, he's one of the best fielders in this PNG team. Shakib looks to go big once again and he lofts this towards long-on. The fielder in the deep is swift to move across as he puts in a dive and grabs this inches above the turf. Superb! Shakib was struggling due to the heat and he has perished in his quest to up the ante. He has been playing continuously in such conditions since the second half of IPL, and even the best of fielders would struggle in such heat.

full_text: Shakib to Charles Amini, Caught by Naim!! And the quality of catching has only gotten better since the start of this match. There were plenty of misfields earlier in the day, but since then, we've seen quite a few blinders. This being one of them! And it's Shakib Al Hasan who gets a wicket again, yes on his first ball. This was lofted towards long-on by Charles Amini, but Naim is swift to move across and he dives sideways to complete a fantastic grab. The top-order of PNG has been blown away!
